title: Autoload Generation
interaction_flow: Caller → AutoloadGenerator: dump(config, localRepo, rootPackage, installationManager, targetDir, scanPsrPackages, suffix, locker)
AutoloadGenerator → Filesystem: new Filesystem(); ensureDirectoryExists(vendorDir); ensureDirectoryExists(targetDir)
AutoloadGenerator → EventDispatcher: dispatchScript(PRE_AUTOLOAD_DUMP, devMode, opts) [if runScripts]
AutoloadGenerator → AutoloadGenerator: buildPackageMap(installationManager, rootPackage, packages) → packageMap
buildPackageMap → AutoloadGenerator: validatePackage(package) [validates PSR-4 namespace/target-dir compat]
AutoloadGenerator → AutoloadGenerator: parseAutoloads(packageMap, rootPackage, filteredDevPackages) → autoloads{psr-0, psr-4, classmap, files, exclude-from-classmap}
AutoloadGenerator → AutoloadGenerator: build namespacesFile (psr-0) and psr4File strings
AutoloadGenerator → ClassMapGenerator: scanPaths(dir, exclusionRegex) [for each classmap dir]
AutoloadGenerator → ClassMapGenerator: scanPaths(dir, exclusionRegex, psrType, namespace) [for psr-0/psr-4 dirs if scanPsrPackages]
AutoloadGenerator → ClassMap: getAmbiguousClasses() → report warnings via IOInterface
AutoloadGenerator → ClassMap: getMap() → iterate to build classmapFile string
AutoloadGenerator → Locker: getLockData()['content-hash'] [if suffix null and locker locked]
AutoloadGenerator → AutoloadGenerator: getStaticFile(suffix, targetDir, vendorPath, basePath) → staticFileContent
getStaticFile → ClassLoader: new ClassLoader(); set(ns,path) [psr-0]; setPsr4(ns,path) [psr-4]; addClassMap(map)
getStaticFile → returns ComposerStaticInit{suffix} class with static props + getInitializer()
AutoloadGenerator → AutoloadGenerator: getPlatformCheck(packageMap, checkPlatform, devPackageNames) [if needed]
AutoloadGenerator → AutoloadGenerator: getAutoloadRealFile(...) → autoload_real.php content with ComposerAutoloaderInit{suffix}
getAutoloadRealFile → generates getLoader() that: spl_autoload_register, new ClassLoader(dirname(__DIR__)), loads static maps, registers, returns
AutoloadGenerator → EventDispatcher: dispatchScript(POST_AUTOLOAD_DUMP, devMode, opts) [if runScripts]

key_methods.AutoloadGenerator::dump: Main orchestrator. Params: Config, InstalledRepositoryInterface, RootPackageInterface, InstallationManager, targetDir, scanPsrPackages, suffix, Locker. Returns ClassMap.
key_methods.AutoloadGenerator::buildPackageMap: Builds [[PackageInterface, installPath]] from repo packages via InstallationManager::getInstallPath(). Skips AliasPackage.
key_methods.AutoloadGenerator::parseAutoloads: Compiles psr-0/psr-4/classmap/files/exclude maps from sorted packageMap. Root package appended last (highest precedence).
key_methods.AutoloadGenerator::parseAutoloadsType: Iterates packageMap for one autoload type, resolves paths, handles PSR-0 target-dir and classmap exclusions.
key_methods.AutoloadGenerator::createLoader: Instantiates ClassLoader, registers psr-0 (add), psr-4 (addPsr4), classmap (addClassMap). Used for in-memory loader.
key_methods.AutoloadGenerator::getStaticFile: Generates autoload_static.php: ComposerStaticInit{suffix} with static array props and getInitializer() closure binding into ClassLoader.
key_methods.AutoloadGenerator::getAutoloadRealFile: Generates autoload_real.php: ComposerAutoloaderInit{suffix}::getLoader() bootstraps ClassLoader via spl_autoload_register, loads static init, registers, requires include files.
key_methods.AutoloadGenerator::getIncludePathsFile: Generates include_paths.php from packages with getIncludePaths().
key_methods.AutoloadGenerator::getIncludeFilesFile: Generates autoload_files.php mapping hash => path for 'files' autoload entries.
key_methods.AutoloadGenerator::getPlatformCheck: Generates platform_check.php verifying PHP version and extension requirements.
key_methods.AutoloadGenerator::buildExclusionRegex: Builds regex pattern for paths to exclude from classmap scanning.

key_relationships: AutoloadGenerator depends_on EventDispatcher (script events pre/post dump)
AutoloadGenerator depends_on Filesystem (ensureDirectoryExists, filePutContentsIfModified, safeCopy, findShortestPathCode, normalizePath)
AutoloadGenerator depends_on ClassLoader (instantiates for static file generation and createLoader)
AutoloadGenerator depends_on Locker (getLockData content-hash for suffix)
AutoloadGenerator depends_on Config (vendor-dir, autoloader-suffix, platform-check, use-include-path, prepend-autoloader)
ClassMap contains InstalledVersions entry (manually added: Composer\InstalledVersions → InstalledVersions.php)
ClassLoader registered in generated autoload_real.php via spl_autoload_register
ComposerStaticInit{suffix} initializes ClassLoader via Closure::bind (private property access)
generated_output_files: vendor/autoload.php — entry point, requires autoload_real.php, returns ClassLoader
important_notes: suffix: unique hash appended to class names (ComposerAutoloaderInitABC123) to allow multiple Composer installations. Sourced from autoloader-suffix config, existing autoload.php regex match, locker content-hash, or random bytes.
scanPsrPackages: when true (or classMapAuthoritative), PSR-0/4 dirs are also scanned by ClassMapGenerator to build a full classmap.
classMapAuthoritative: forces scanPsrPackages=true; ClassLoader will only use classmap (no filesystem fallback).
APCu caching: optional prefix for APCu-based class lookup caching in ClassLoader.
devMode auto-detection: reads vendor/composer/installed.json 'dev' field if devMode not explicitly set.
InstalledVersions is manually added to classmap (not via package autoload) at line 394.
dryRun: skips all file writes, returns ClassMap only.
Root package is appended last to sorted map (highest precedence for classmap/psr overrides).
Files autoload order: sorted dependents-first to ensure dependencies are loaded before dependent files.
